channel.title: CKB Talk Radar Daily Brief
channel.description: Daily Nervos Talk community briefing and latest active topics.

item.title: CKB Talk Daily Brief - 2026-05-01
item.description: ## 今日发生了什么 今日社区讨论集中在技术建设与应用进展两大主线：Invisibook 隐私订单簿完成第一阶段里程碑，CellScript DSL 开发主动向 iCKB Protocol 抛出合作橄榄枝寻求真实协议压力测试，同时论坛分类重构进入公测阶段引发社区成员积极反馈与细节讨论。[S02, S03, S05] ## 重点话题 **隐私订单簿 Invisibook Milestone 1 落地**：Lawliet_Chan 宣布第一阶段完成并公开代码仓库与测试指南，zz_tovarishch 随即反馈文档仅有中文版、建议补充英文版本，显示项目正从原型走向可验证的开放协作阶段。[S03, S04] **CellScript 寻求与 iCKB 联合测试**：ArthurZhang 提出以 iCKB 作为 CellScript DSL 的"自然压力测试对象"，意图用真实 CKB 协议作为成熟度基准，强调"不做生产等价声明"但追求标准化差异验证，显示该 DSL 正在从概念向实战过渡。[S02] **论坛分类重构进入公测**：terrytai 宣布"Nervos Talk Renewal"上线 Staging 环境并开放测试，翻译插件全站试运行；RetricSu、janx、ArthurZhang 与 Thinker 接连提交中英文分类命名、板块边界模糊及跨领域内容发现等具体反馈，讨论深入至开发者体验层面。[S05, S06, S07, S08, S09] **CKB Kickstarter 众筹 MVP 收获社区肯定**：RetricSu...

item.title: [DIS] Quantir Risk Intelligence for CKB Ecosystem and Cross-Chain Monitoring (1 posts)
item.description: Quantir proposes to build a CKB-aware risk intelligence and monitoring layer for the Nervos ecosystem. The system will monitor selected public CKB ecosystem activity, detect abnormal behavior, compute normalized risk signals, and deliver explainable alerts for developers, ecosystem operators, dashboards, and community monitoring workflows. Quantir is an existing DeFi and on-chain risk monitoring platform with live collectors, transaction monitoring, risk scoring, alert delivery, API/WebSocket interfaces, and explainability services. This proposal adapts the existing Quantir architecture to CKB-specific ecosystem signals rather than building a monitoring system from scratch. Requested...

item.title: CellScript - A DSL for Cell-Based Contracts (1 posts)
item.description: @phroi By the way, if you don’t mind, I have been looking into using real CKB protocols as maturity benchmarks for CellScript, and your iCKB seems like a natural stress test candidate. The idea is not to make any production-equivalence claim, but to use normalised differential fixtures to expose weak spots in the language model under realistic DAO/xUDT/accounting-heavy scenarios. In practice, this would mean comparing behaviour under the same semantic inputs, capacities, output data, deps, headers and witnesses where relevant, allowing only the script-under-test code cell/hash to differ, and then executing both sides in CKB VM/testtool with pass/pass and fail/fail alignment, plus explicit...

item.title: [DIS] Decentralized privacy order-book appchain based on CKB L1 - 2026.phase-1 (2 posts)
item.description: milestone.1 已完成 代码仓库： GitHub - invisibook-lab/invisibook: A privacy-preserving, censorship-resistant, decentralized order book. · GitHub 检验方式： invisibook/docs/milestones/test_guide_1.md at main · invisibook-lab/invisibook · GitHub Hi Lawliet, 验证方法文档里只有中文，建议加上英文的版本

item.title: Streamlining the forum categories needs your testing and feedback (5 posts)
item.description: TL;DR 最新的分类重构已经在 Staging Server 上线，欢迎大家测试和反馈意见：https://talk-staging.nervos.org/ Babel Reunited enters public beta — a new foundation for the future development of Nervos Talk Nervos Talk Renewal & Governance 翻译插件已经全站开始测试. Babel Reunited 翻译插件已经测试一个多月了，经过大家的反馈和改进，现在翻译质量和体验已经比最初好了很多。 这里回顾一下最初做这个插件的目的： 为什么做 Babel Reunited 这个插件是我专门为 Nervos Talk 开发的，最初只是为了解决两个痛点： 在设计和管理 CKB Community Fund DAO 的论坛规则时，我必须用双语发帖。这非常麻烦：需要先用一种语言写原帖，再翻译后手动贴回帖子中。这个过程不仅容易出错，也经常遇到帖子字数超限的问题。同时，一些回复者和发帖者也不会严格按照规则贴两个语言的版本，这也给讨论带来了一些障碍。 Nervos Talk 最大的分类是按语言划分的，目前只有三种语言：英文、中文、西班牙语。而每个语言分类下又有很多重叠但不完全相同的子分类。这让我有时不得不在三个地方用不同语言发布同样的内容，也意味着不同语言背景的人几乎不可能在同一个 thread 中讨论同一个话题。 其中第1点已经解决了，相信参与了的人都能体会到。现在是时候解决第二个问题，也是我认为 Nervos Talk...

item.title: Introducing CKB Kickstarter: Decentralized All-or-Nothing Crowdfunding on Nervos CKB (Testnet MVP Live) (1 posts)
item.description: awesome! keep it going. I just want to share that Sustainable platform business model is very important in the early stage for CKB applications. It might sound counter-intuitive. But I, personally, love to see more apps that has the pontencial to generate real cash flow in the CKB ecosystem. For crypto, money is the new attension.

item.title: Spark Program | fiber-checkout — A "Stripe-Style" React Payment Library for Fiber Network (4 posts)
item.description: I totally agree with your idea about targetting these types of countries and currency’s, this should be CKB’s niche in general, not just for payments and stable coins. Like @xingtianchunyan said in that excellent evaluation, CKBs market and network affect position makes it very hard to compete in the current stable coins/payment market, so your idea is the right direction. But I’m not sure how your LP idea works, I don’t think you can just add one time liquidity paring a stable with a highly volatile token like CKB and expect it to maintain the currencies value, especially seeing as there’s no arbitrage opportunities to even attempt to maintain the value of the pool. You could have the...

item.title: [DIS] Mobile-Ready CKB Light Client (Pocket Node) for Android (1 posts)
item.description: Release Summary - Pocket Node v1.5.1 Pocket Node v1.5.1 - User Education Release Big thanks to everyone who tried v1.5.0 and gave feedback,This release is the response. Pocket Node is a self-custodial CKB wallet, but unlike most wallets it actually runs a CKB light client on your phone. That’s powerful, but the trade-off has always been that the first-time experience felt foreign to anyone whose mental model is MetaMask or Trust Wallet etc. v1.5.1 is the first round of fixing that. What’s new: First-run sync coachmark. When you create or import a wallet for the first time, a one-time spotlight on the Sync card explains what your phone is actually doing when syncing. ? help icons...
